content.text:
I see - the MCP server requires OAuth authentication. This is complex to do directly via HTTP. Instead, let me use Claude Code's built-in MCP server support. First, let me create a simple Claude Code session to interact with the MCP server.

Let me create a script to call Claude Code with the MCP server:

input.command:
cat > /tmp/list-tokens.md << 'EOF'
I need to list all my API tokens from Mittwald using the MCP tools. Please call the mittwald_user_api_token_list tool to show me what tokens I currently have.
EOF
input.description: Create prompt for listing tokens
